title: Roasted Sage and Broccoli
description: A simple and flavorful side dish that pairs perfectly with grilled meats. The slightly bitter taste of broccoli is balanced by the earthy flavor of sage.
instructions: Rinse the broccoli and cut it into florets.
In a bowl, toss the broccoli with the chopped sage until the florets are evenly coated.
Transfer the broccoli mixture to a baking sheet and drizzle with a little bit of olive oil.
Broil in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes or until the broccoli is tender and slightly charred.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
